description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New Entry (Published: July 20, 2026)

Event Details

Date: September 24 (Thursday)

Gathering Time: 10:00 a.m.

Gathering Place: West parking lot of Hanno City Hall

Route: City Hall → Nakayama-Nishi Intersection → Yatsuta Regeneration Area → Chuo Park → Hanno Riverbed → Misugi Plateau Park → Hikari Bridge → Yaoroshi → City Hall

Distance: Approximately 10 kilometers

Estimated Duration: Approximately 3 hours 30 minutes

Fee: 200 yen (insurance and other costs, collected on the day)

What to Bring: Lunch box, drinks, rain gear, Sugo-Ashi Handbook (if you have one)

Registration: Apply to ASA Hanno by Sunday, September 20
Phone: 042-972-4701
Fax: 042-974-2190

Weather Cancellation: To confirm cancellation due to weather or other reasons, contact ASA Hanno after 9:00 a.m. on the day of the event.

Inquiries: Onda 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/7601.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event: Walk around Tenranzan's Waterside and Misugi Plateau on Thursday, September 24, 2026
